code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut out = ""
mut current = ""
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut first = true
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut is_ws = true
  if i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_ws = true
    else
      is_ws = false
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  end
  if is_ws and not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      if not has_prev or v != prev
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    current = ""
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println(out)
